'''Lamuir IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Freeworlds Territory]]. It was formerly part of the [[Herglic Trade Empire]]. The [[Priole Danna Festival]] was held there.

Lamuir IV was a voting member of the [[League of Tapani Freeworlds]].

{{Planet-stub}}
